description: Brazilian organized crime syndicate founded in 1993 by eight prisoners at Taubaté Penitentiary. Based in São Paulo, it is Latin America's largest drug gang with 40,000 lifetime members and 60,000 contractors. Active throughout South America, West Africa, and Europe, it controls over 50% of Brazil's drug exports to Europe and has a partnership with the 'Ndrangheta. Known for a business model favoring quiet market expansion over violent turf wars.

country_links.evidence_quote: Main routes/Significant influence: Paraná , Santa Catarina , Mato Grosso do Sul , Paraguay , Argentina , Bolivia .
country_links.context: The PCC has main routes and significant influence in Argentina.

country_links.evidence_quote: the RFB also detected an increase in drug seizures on ships heading to Australia
country_links.context: The PCC ships drugs to Australia, as detected by increased seizures on vessels heading there.

country_links.evidence_quote: the value chain often starts with stolen or second-hand vehicles in Brazil exchanged for drugs in countries such as Bolivia and Paraguay
country_links.context: The PCC sources cocaine from Bolivia.

country_links.evidence_quote: cocaine supplied from Bolivia, Peru and Colombia
country_links.context: The PCC sources cocaine from Colombia.

country_links.evidence_quote: South America : All Sovereign states and French Guiana .
country_links.context: The PCC has significant activity in South America including French Guiana.

country_links.context: The PCC ships drugs to Hong Kong, as detected by increased seizures on vessels heading there.

country_links.evidence_quote: the RFB also detected an increase in drug seizures on ships heading to Indonesia
country_links.context: The PCC ships drugs to Indonesia, as detected by increased seizures on vessels heading there.

country_links.evidence_quote: An international expansion fueled by the cocaine trade made the PCC establish a profitable partnership with the Italian 'Ndrangheta
country_links.context: The PCC established a profitable partnership with the Italian 'Ndrangheta.

country_links.evidence_quote: Asia : Lebanon , Turkey and Japan .
country_links.context: The PCC has significant activity in Asia including Japan.

country_links.evidence_quote: Asia : Lebanon , Turkey and Japan .
country_links.context: The PCC has significant activity in Asia including Lebanon.

country_links.evidence_quote: North America : United States and Mexico .
country_links.context: The PCC has significant activity in North America including Mexico.

country_links.evidence_quote: The 2020 arrest of a Brazilian drug trafficker linked to the 'Ndrangheta and to senior PCC members in Maputo has also contributed to evidence that the group had been active in southern and eastern Africa for years
country_links.context: The PCC has been active in Mozambique, as evidenced by the arrest of a Brazilian drug trafficker linked to the PCC in Maputo.

country_links.evidence_quote: the PCC also established itself as a central player in the West African cocaine trade , with its members being able to exert control over neighbourhoods in cities such as Lagos and Abuja
country_links.context: The PCC established itself as a central player in the West African cocaine trade, with members controlling neighbourhoods in Lagos and Abuja.

country_links.evidence_quote: In April 2017 the company Prosegur located in Ciudad del Este, in the Triple Frontier of Brazil, Argentina and Paraguay, was robbed by a group of at least 30 men carrying heavy firepower... the PCC was the main suspect for the heist
country_links.context: The PCC operates in the Triple Frontier area between Brazil, Paraguay and Argentina, and was the main suspect for a heist in Ciudad del Este, Paraguay.

country_links.evidence_quote: cocaine supplied from Bolivia, Peru and Colombia
country_links.context: The PCC sources cocaine from Peru.

country_links.evidence_quote: According to a leaked Portuguese intelligence report, the group also has around 1,000 associates in Lisbon
country_links.context: The PCC has around 1,000 associates in Lisbon.

country_links.context: The PCC ships drugs to Singapore, as detected by increased seizures on vessels heading there.

country_links.context: The PCC has significant activity in Asia including Turkey.

country_links.evidence_quote: arms trafficked from Paraguay and the United States
country_links.context: The PCC traffics arms from the United States.
